items.title: Fullstack Web & Mobile Development
items.text: Design and development of high-performance web and mobile apps, from analysis to production: Next.js / React, FastAPI / Laravel, Flutter.

items.title: DevSecOps & Cloud
items.text: Industrialization and deployment: GitLab CI/CD, Docker, Ansible, Terraform, Kubernetes, observability (ELK) and application security (Snyk, static analysis).

items.title: AI & RAG Applications
items.text: Development of AI-augmented assistants and business chatbots: LangChain, LiteLLM, OpenAI / Ollama and vector knowledge bases.

items.title: IoT & Health Data
items.text: Integration of connected devices (EmotiBit, Withings) and real-time pipelines, compliant with the FHIR / HL7 healthcare standards.

items.title: Architecture, Audit & Tech Lead
items.text: Analysis and design (UML), technology choices, security, Tech Lead / project ownership role, code reviews and complex problem solving.

items.title: Training & Documentation
items.text: Upskilling of teams and learners on web / cloud technologies, plus writing technical documentation and user guides.
